name: Beef Stew with Apple Dumplings/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the meat with a mixture of flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Combine the meat, onions, garlic, beef broth, apple juice, vinegar, thyme, and curry in a removable liner.
3. Place the liner in the base.
4. Cook on auto for 7 hours; or high for 4 to 5 hours; or low for 8 to 10 hours.
5. Remove the cover and place tablespoons of dumpling batter on top of the stew.
6. Cover and cook on high for 20 minutes.
7. To make the dumpling batter, blend applesauce with eggs and parsley. Add flour, baking powder, and salt, then beat into the egg mixture.
